title: Episode 1
overview: "A new world" – After going on a rampage with her partner-in-crime, The Joker, Harley Quinn is sent straight to Belle Reve Penitentiary.

title: Episode 2
overview: Harley Quinn, Deadshot, Peacemaker, Clayface and King Shark find themselves in a new world of swords and sorcery, known as an "ISEKAI."

title: Episode 3
overview: Harley Quinn and the Suicide Squad strike a deal with Queen Aldora of the Kingdom to deactivate the bombs in their necks.

title: Episode 4
overview: The war between the Kingdom and the Empire has been raging for decades. Hoping to end the carnage, Princess Fione enlists Harley and her team's help.

title: Episode 5
overview: Taking on Ratcatcher's army of beasts turns out to be a piece of cake for the Suicide Squad.

title: Episode 6
overview: Harley and the Suicide Squad triumphantly return from dragon-slaying when they find a blazing fortress and a heartbreaking defeat.

title: Episode 7
overview: To stop the Suicide Squad from resetting their bombs, Thinker has his elf army build a fortress near the gate.

title: Episode 8
overview: Back in the royal capital after their epic triumph, the Suicide Squad are in for a rude awakening.

title: Episode 9
overview: The shocking truth about the Undead King is revealed! Princess Fione is devastated to learn the truth, but when Harley drops some truth bombs, it's game on!

title: Episode 10
overview: Things look dire when Lich's undead army rolls in and starts wrecking the Kingdom.
